TempCtl.PhyTempCtl: gdp,middle1,middle2,middle3,middle4,bias,wininner,winouter,air1 gdp,middle1,middle2,middle3,middle4,wininner gdp,/Control/PMCExports/Datas/GDPTempSP gdp,/Control/PMCExports/Datas/GDPTemp middle1,/Control/PMCExports/Datas/MC1TempSP middle1,/Control/PMCExports/Datas/MC1Temp middle2,/Control/PMCExports/Datas/MC2TempSP middle2,/Control/PMCExports/Datas/MC2Temp middle3,/Control/PMCExports/Datas/MC3TempSP middle3,/Control/PMCExports/Datas/MC3Temp middle4,/Control/PMCExports/Datas/MC4TempSP middle4,/Control/PMCExports/Datas/MC4Temp bias,/Control/PMCExports/Datas/BiasTemp wininner,/Control/PMCExports/Datas/WindowInnerTempSP wininner,/Control/PMCExports/Datas/WindowInnerTemp winouter,/Control/PMCExports/Datas/WindowOuterTemp air1,/Control/PMCExports/Datas/AirSensor ./OpenInterlocks &TempCtlInterlock; &SetSimulated;
